assertions.description: LanguageModel.params() returns a Promise of options including temperature & topK defaults.
assertions.test: (async()=>{if(!window.LanguageModel||typeof LanguageModel.params!=='function') return false; const p=await LanguageModel.params(); return typeof p.defaultTemperature==='number' && typeof p.defaultTopK==='number';})()

assertions.description: LanguageModel.params() exposes maxTemperature and maxTopK upper bounds.
assertions.test: (async()=>{if(!window.LanguageModel||typeof LanguageModel.params!=='function') return false; const p=await LanguageModel.params(); return typeof p.maxTemperature==='number' && typeof p.maxTopK==='number';})()

assertions.description: LanguageModel.create({temperature, topK}) accepts the sampling parameters without throwing TypeError on dictionary shape.
A created LanguageModel exposes its temperature value.
A created LanguageModel exposes its topK value.
